title: Chrysophyllum manaosense
taxonomy: Chrysophyllum manaosense is classified within the family Sapotaceae. This family is a part of the order Ebenales, and further classified under the clade Asterids. The class to which Chrysophyllum manaosense belongs is Magnoliopsida, which is a subgroup of flowering plants. The division to which it belongs is Magnoliophyta. At the kingdom level, Chrysophyllum manaosense is classified as Plantae.

intro: Chrysophyllum manaosense, also known as Amazonian star apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum manaosense include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve blood pressure, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer.
